articles.title: Top Prime Day Tech Deals You Can't Miss
articles.description: Discover the best tech deals for Prime Day, curated by Mashable's tech editor. Save big on essential gadgets and electronics.
articles.impact: Prime Day offers significant savings on tech.

articles.title: Google Home Speaker Unboxing Reveals Design Flaw
articles.description: An early unboxing of the Google Home Speaker highlights a concerning design choice. Users praise sound quality but criticize the hardware.
articles.impact: Google faces backlash over design decisions.

articles.title: Star Fox Nintendo Switch 2 Reviews Are In
articles.description: Reviews for Star Fox on Nintendo Switch 2 are now available, showcasing gameplay and features. Fans are eager for this release.
articles.impact: Star Fox reviews boost anticipation for launch.

articles.title: Sega Launches Two Sonic Game Collections for Switch
articles.description: Sega celebrates Sonic's 35th anniversary with two new game collections for the Switch, featuring classic and modern titles.
articles.impact: Sega revives nostalgia with new collections.

articles.title: Gemini Intelligence Appears in Android 17 Beta
articles.description: The latest Android 17 QPR1 Beta introduces Gemini Intelligence branding, alongside bug fixes for Pixel devices.
articles.impact: Google enhances Pixel experience with updates.

articles.title: Best Buy Tech Fest Offers Major Discounts
articles.description: Best Buy's Tech Fest event features significant discounts on electronics, including headphones and video games. Don't miss out!
articles.impact: Best Buy's event attracts bargain hunters.

articles.title: DeepMind's Hassabis Claims Google Leads AI Talent
articles.description: Despite recent leadership changes, DeepMind's CEO asserts Google continues to attract top AI talent, maintaining its competitive edge.
articles.impact: Google remains a leader in AI innovation.

articles.title: Douze Dixièmes Shuts Down After Independence
articles.description: MIO: Memories in Orbit developer Douze Dixièmes is closing its doors shortly after regaining independence, marking a sad end for the studio.
articles.impact: Douze Dixièmes' closure impacts the gaming community.

articles.title: Kylie Jenner Launches AI-Powered Meta Glasses
articles.description: Kylie Jenner's new Meta AI sunglasses can take photos and sing. Priced at $399, they aim to blend fashion with technology.
articles.impact: Kylie Jenner merges fashion with tech innovation.

articles.title: Chrome Autofill Enhances Google Wallet Integration
articles.description: Google is enhancing Chrome Autofill with deeper Google Wallet integration, streamlining online form filling for users.
articles.impact: Google simplifies online transactions for users.

articles.title: Galaxy Watch 9 Leaks Reveal New Features
articles.description: Recent leaks of the Galaxy Watch 9 showcase updated design and features, generating excitement ahead of its release.
articles.impact: Galaxy Watch 9 leaks heighten consumer anticipation.

articles.title: Microsoft Launches Affordable Surface Models
articles.description: Microsoft introduces new 8GB RAM models of the Surface Pro and Surface Laptop to address rising prices and improve accessibility.
articles.impact: Microsoft aims to make devices more affordable.

articles.title: Prime Day Tablet Deals Offer Huge Savings
articles.description: Amazon's Prime Day features significant discounts on tablets, including iPads and Samsung Galaxy Tabs. Don't miss these offers!
articles.impact: Prime Day brings exceptional savings on tablets.

articles.title: GTA 6 Pre-Order Pages Go Live Soon
articles.description: Retailers are preparing for Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders, with pages going live ahead of the official launch on June 25.

articles.title: Amazon Slashes Price on Garmin Fenix 8 Pro
articles.description: Amazon offers a record low price on the Garmin Fenix 8 Pro, reducing it by $350 ahead of the summer outdoor season.
articles.impact: Amazon's deal boosts Garmin's sales potential.
